title: Requiring employees of school districts and postsecondary educational institutions to use the name and pronouns consistent with a student's biological sex and birth certificate and authorizing a cause of action for violations therefor.
summary: Requiring employees of school districts and postsecondary educational institutions to use the name and pronouns consistent with a student's biological sex and birth certificate and authorizing a cause of action for violations therefor.

actions.action: Senate Referred to Committee on Education
Senate Hearing: Monday, February 10, 2025, 1:30 PM Room 144-S
Senate Committee Report recommending bill be passed as amended by Committee on Education
Senate Committee of the Whole - Committee Report be adopted
Senate Committee of the Whole - Motion to Amend - Offered by Senator Schmidt
Senate Committee of the Whole - Amendment by Senator Schmidt was rejected Yea: 3 Nay: 31
Senate Committee of the Whole - Be passed as amended
Senate Emergency Final Action - Passed as amended; Yea: 26 Nay: 14
House Referred to Committee on Education
House Hearing: Tuesday, March 4, 2025, 1:30 PM Room 218-N
House Committee Report recommending bill be passed as amended by Committee on Education
House Stricken from Calendar by Rule 1507
